_comment: Thunderstorm Sea (雷暴海) — vast sea of crackling thunder clouds where lightning beasts roam. Canon: a sub-region of the Ancient Thunder Realm (古雷界), the source dimension of thunder-attribute spiritual energy. The sea is a perpetual storm-wreathed ocean of thunder clouds — lightning strikes constantly. Ghasts and phantoms roam here as thunder-spirit manifestations. Non-thunder cultivators are damaged by merely being present. Wang Lin enters the Ancient Thunder Realm to cultivate his thunder essence and Ji Realm (a thunder-based killing technique); the thunder here can be 'stored' into special containers (Store-All Ji Thunder). Prime Directive: the perpetual storm, lightning beasts, and cloud-sea are objective properties of the realm — they exist because thunder-aspect Qi saturates this pocket dimension, not because anyone perceives them.
